prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the S58B30T0 engine featuring a Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbocharger with a 68mm compressor wheel, 76mm turbine wheel, and billet aluminum compressor housing, paired with a custom 4-inch V-band downpipe and a CSF intercooler with a 5.5-row core and 1,200 CFM airflow capacity, supporting 750+ WHP on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU and flex-fuel sensor integration

Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension kit (part #BM15RT) with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), 20-way adjustable top mounts, and custom valving for the G82 chassis, paired with a 25mm front and 20mm rear H&R lowering springs for optimized camber and caster alignment

Full drivetrain reinforcement including a Wavetrac limited-slip differential with a 3.15 final drive ratio, a GForce Engineering 4-inch aluminum driveshaft with CV joints, and a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 dual-disc clutch with a lightweight flywheel (12.5 lbs) and organic/carbon hybrid friction material for the S58 engine
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit for the G82 M4, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with 30mm extended flares, rear quarter panels with 40mm extensions, and a custom 2-piece carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated brake ducts, all finished in a 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with gloss black accents

Vorsteiner GTS-5 carbon fiber front lip spoiler (part #V-FL-0800) with integrated canards and a custom 3D-printed ABS splitter extension for improved downforce, paired with a VRSF M Performance-style carbon fiber rear spoiler (part #V-RS-0900) with a 30mm adjustable Gurney flap

Custom interior overhaul featuring a full Alcantara headliner and A-pillar trim from Euro Design Werks, Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses (part #QR-10), and a MOTEC C127 digital dash display with custom S58 engine data logging, all wrapped in a BMW Individual Pythonic Orange leather and Alcantara upholstery with contrast stitching
